---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What you want

<!-- Describe the capability. Be concrete — "add an export for X" is
actionable; "improve exports" is not. -->

## Why

<!-- What problem does this solve? Is there a real design hitting a
limit today that would drive this? -->

## How you'd use it

<!-- Sketch the user-visible interface. UI control? CLI flag? JSON
field on the design record? Where would this show up in the result
readouts? -->

## Scope

<!-- What's in and out of this request? If this is a big feature,
break it into a first shippable slice + follow-ons. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Any workarounds today? Any other approaches you rejected and why? -->

## Willing to contribute?

- [ ] I can write the PR if someone sanity-checks the approach
- [ ] I can test on real hardware (cold-flow / hot-fire data)
- [ ] I need this but can't help ship it
